description: As a Customer Service Representative, create a new phone order in the Magento Admin for existing customer Alice Williams (alice.williams@example.com). The order must include 2x Wireless Headphones (SKU: HEADPHONES-001) and 1x LED Desk Lamp (SKU: LAMP-001). Ship the order to a new address for Emily Carter: 456 Magnolia Drive, Portland, Oregon, 97201, United States (Phone: 555-0199). Use 'Flat Rate' shipping and 'Check / Money Order' payment. Include the comment 'Phone order - customer unable to complete online checkout' and submit the order.
